calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James R. Sutton, Esq. and Nicholas L. Sanders, Esq. The Sutton Law Firm, appearing for Petitioner Hochstatter, Tel. (415)359-7701
Chris Skinnel, Esq. Nielsen, Merksamer, Parrinello, Gross & Leoni, LLP appearing for Petitioner Hochstatter, Tel.(415) 389-6800
Aileen M. McGrath, Esq., Sara J. Eisenberg, Esq. and Jenica D. Maldonado, City Attorney Office appearing for Real Party in Interest San Francisco Ballot Simplification Committee,
Tel.(415) 554-4691.
Louis H. Renne, Esq. Renne Public Law Group, appearing Amicus Curiae, Tel.(415)848-7200.

The Court hears argument and adopts his tentative ruling as final, with a few minor edits. The Court GRANTS in part and DENIES in part the Motion for Peremptory Writ of Mandate. Petitioner submits a proposed order, approved as to form. The Court signs an order and a writ is issued.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not Reported, (505).

Hearing On Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James R. Sutton, Esq. and Nicholas L. Sanders, Esq. The Sutton Law Firm, appearing for Petitioner Hochstatter, Tel. (415)359-7701
Chris Skinnel, Esq. Nielsen, Merksamer, Parrinello, Gross & Leoni, LLP appearing for Petitioner Hochstatter, Tel.(415) 389-6800
Aileen M. McGrath, Esq., Sara J. Eisenberg, Esq. and Jenica D. Maldonado, City Attorney Office appearing for Real Party in Interest San Francisco Ballot Simplification Committee,
Tel.(415) 554-4691.
Louis H. Renne, Esq. Renne Public Law Group, appearing Amicus Curiae, Tel.(415)848-7200.

The Court hears argument and adopts his tentative ruling as final, with a few minor edits. The Court GRANTS in part and DENIES in part the Motion for Peremptory Writ of Mandate. Petitioner submits a proposed order, approved as to form. The Court signs an order and a writ is issued.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not Reported, (505).
